meaning: adj.[解]骨间的,小腿骨间的 前臂骨间的
examples: Objective: to study the anatomical basis of anterior interosseous nerve (AIN) syndrome.
Objective To explore the anatomical basis of anterior interosseous nerve (AIN) syndrome.
Objective To report the procedure of tissue flap pedicled with anterior interosseous artery and its dorsal branch.
